signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $41
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $41.64M (Week Ending Apr 16); WisdomTree/Grayscale Filings Clear Final SEC Review | YES | HIGH confidence**  
U.S. spot XRP ETFs recorded $41.64 million in net inflows for the week ending April 16—the largest in three months and a 254% jump from the prior week—driving a 12.5% price surge from April lows to ~$1.44 amid a forming cup-and-handle pattern.[1][7]
